prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace how Rust procedural macros and declarative macros are expanded and lowered to HIR in rust-lang/rust. Find Rust source files implementing: the macro expander entry point, the token stream transformation, the AST expansion, and the HIR lowering from expanded AST.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the rust-systems fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Trace how Rust procedural macros and declarative macros are expanded and lowered to HIR in rust-lang/rust. Find Rust source files implementing: the macro expander entry point, the token stream transformation, the AST expansion, and the HIR lowering from expanded AST.
